ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference code for the transaction */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company involved in the transaction */,
  "co_city" TEXT /* City of the company */,
  "source_company" TEXT /* Source company name */,
  "source_co_city" TEXT /* City of the source company */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., Advance in Trust) */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the transaction */,
  "product_type" INTEGER /* Type of products involved */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for the transaction */,
  "importer" TEXT /* Importer or representative of the transaction */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the company */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., Air Freight, Sea Freight) */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Terms of payment (e.g., Advance, Credit) */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Current status of the transaction */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the transaction */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the transaction */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_source_company FOREIGN KEY ("source_company") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_currency FOREIGN KEY ("currency") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_importer FOREIGN KEY ("importer") REFERENCES importers ("importer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the company is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is registered */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the company */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry or sector of the company */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the company record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the company record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the company record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the company record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the transaction type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction type was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the transaction type */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code of the currency (e.g., AED) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Full name of the currency (e.g., United Arab Emirates Dirham) */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Current exchange rate against AED */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the currency record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the currency record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the currency record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the currency record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product involved in the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the product record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the product record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the product record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the product record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country associated with the region */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the region record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the region record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the region record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the region record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "importers" (
  "importer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each importer */,
  "importer_name" TEXT /* Name of the importer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the importer */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company associated with the importer */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the importer record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the importer record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the importer record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the importer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("importer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_importers_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the country record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the country record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the country record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the country record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_methods" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping method */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the shipping method record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the shipping method record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the shipping method record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the shipping method record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment status */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated transaction */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Current status of the payment (e.g., Paid, Pending) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Bank Transfer, Credit Card) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the payment status record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the payment status record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the payment status record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the payment status record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_status_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated transaction */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the log record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the log record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the log record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the log record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated transaction */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., updated, deleted) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the audit record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the audit record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the audit record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the audit record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currency_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency rate */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency */,
  "rate" REAL /* Exchange rate against AED */,
  "rate_date" TEXT /* Date of the rate */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the currency rate record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the currency rate record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the currency rate record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the currency rate record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_currency_rates_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, trader) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the user profile */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user profile was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the user profile */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who received the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was generated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the alert record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the alert record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the alert record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the alert record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated transaction */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., Air Freight, Sea Freight) */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was sent */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the shipment */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the shipment record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the shipment record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_shipments_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipment_tracking" (
  "tracking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tracking record */,
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated shipment */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "tracking_url" TEXT /* URL for tracking the shipment */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the tracking record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the tracking record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the tracking record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the tracking record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tracking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipment_tracking_shipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipment_id") REFERENCES transaction_shipments ("shipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated transaction */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., invoice, packing list) */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL for accessing the document */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the document record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the document record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the document record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the document record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_documents_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)
